title: PublicAccessBlockConfiguration
description: The PublicAccessBlock configuration that you want to apply to this Amazon S3 account.

BlockPublicAcls.description: Specifies whether Amazon S3 should block public access control lists (ACLs) for buckets in this account.

IgnorePublicAcls.description: Specifies whether Amazon S3 should ignore public ACLs for buckets in this account.

BlockPublicPolicy.description: Specifies whether Amazon S3 should block public bucket policies for buckets in this account.

RestrictPublicBuckets.description: Specifies whether Amazon S3 should restrict public bucket policies for buckets in this account.
